subject: Examen National Anglais (Exam English 1)
II.A: Clean energy \underline{\quad} will reduce greenhouse gas emissions and save the planet from the devastating \underline{\quad} of climate change.
II.B.1: Parents show a lot of (admire) \underline{\quad} for the efforts schools make to support children.
II.B.2: Women have proven to be active and (energy) \underline{\quad} in a variety of domains.
II.C.1: Salah is eager (join) \underline{\quad} the music club in his school.
II.C.2: By the time we arrive, the wedding (end) \underline{\quad}.
II.D.1: I often \underline{\quad} with my friends on the weekends. (hang out - hang up - hang on)
II.D.2: She is the artist \underline{\quad} has made these beautiful paintings. (which - who - when)
II.D.3: It's cloudy and cold. It \underline{\quad} rain any time this afternoon. (may - must - can't)
II.E.1: "Artificial intelligence will change the future of work," said Khalid. \newline Khalid said that \underline{\quad}
Corr II.E.1: artificial intelligence would change the future of work.
II.E.2: The sports club may organize a competition tomorrow. I may participate. \newline If \underline{\quad}.
Corr II.E.2: the sports club organizes a competition tomorrow, I may/will participate.
II.E.3: To increase its sales, the company developed an e-commerce platform. \newline An e-commerce platform \underline{\quad}.
Corr II.E.3: was developed by the company (to increase its sales).
II.F.1: Customer: It bothers me to find my room dirty. \newline Hotel clerk: \underline{\quad} \newline a. Glad to hear that!  b. Ok. We'll fix it, sir.  c. Lucky you!
Corr II.F.1: b. Ok. We'll fix it, sir.
II.F.2: Ahmed: I'm really sorry. I have lost your book! \newline Nora: \underline{\quad} \newline a. That happens.  b. Good for you!  c. I appreciate it.
II.G.1: Patient: I'm having hard time managing stress at work. \newline Doctor: \underline{\quad}
Corr II.G.1: Accept any correct and appropriate answer.
II.G.2: Hassan: Summer is not a good time to travel with your family. \newline Nadia: \underline{\quad}
Corr II.G.2: Accept any correct and appropriate answer.
III.Task1: Nowadays some people keep pets such as dogs, cats and birds. My favorite pet is \underline{\quad} I like it because \underline{\quad} (Complete the paragraph)
Corr III.Task1: Scoring criteria — Relevance of content to the task: 2 pts; Appropriateness and variety of vocabulary: 1 pt; Grammar and mechanics: 1 pt. (Accept any correct and appropriate completion.)
